description_long: This house features a compact, rectangular structure with a prominent front porch covered by a gabled roof and supported by dark columns. The exterior is clad in horizontal yellow siding on the front, contrasted by black and white walls on the sides and rear, and a red shingled mansard-style roof at the back. The front facade includes three symmetrically placed windows and a central entryway accessed by a short set of steps, flanked by a row of small shrubs. The rear of the house displays a large, steeply sloped roof with a single dormer window, while the sides have a mix of windows and a visible interior bedroom. The house appears to be a single-family dwelling with a traditional, slightly eclectic architectural style. The overall design suggests a blend of classic and modern elements, suitable for a suburban or urban neighborhood.
description: A compact, yellow-sided house with a gabled front porch, red mansard roof, and symmetrical windows, blending classic and modern styles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow siding, three windows, central entryway with steps, gabled porch roof, and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the steep red mansard roof, black wall, and a single dormer window.
description_view_2: Side view displaying black and yellow walls, two windows, and a partial view of the interior bedroom.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view with the black wall and a single window under the mansard roof, minimal exterior detail.
attribute_architectural_style: Eclectic with Mansard and Gable influences
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows on front, single dormer at rear, mixed side placement
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, covered by a gabled porch roof, flanked by shrubs and supported by dark columns
